homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental track combines fast-paced techno rhythms with driving electronic drums and a pulsating synthesizer bassline. The infectious, repetitive melody creates an upbeat atmosphere ideal for a nightclub or high-energy party setting.

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This intense instrumental track uses a fast-paced rhythm and distorted guitars to create a chaotic, aggressive atmosphere perfect for high-stakes action sequences. The heavy, dark mood is driven by synthesizers and electronic drums that blend with glitchy sound effects to produce an urgent and dangerous feel. Ultimately, the music serves as a tense soundtrack ideal for video game boss battles or industrial-themed scenes.

The piece features an electric guitar solo alongside bass and acoustic drums, creating a mood perfect for a cinematic car chase scene. While the instrumentation includes hints of blues and funk, the overall vibe remains heavy and action-oriented.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental hip-hop track is driven by complex, syncopated electronic drums and a prominent bassline at a fast tempo. The heavy rhythm creates an energetic and danceable groove that works well for club settings or intense workouts. Although the base caption suggests a hip-hop style, the presence of synth elements and dark intensity aligns with similar tracks in the witchhouse genre often associated with the artist Sematary.

The synth-pop influence is evident in the uplifting melodies and driving rhythm, creating an atmosphere ideal for workouts or high-energy parties. While AI-generated to accompany philosophical lyrics about cognitive behaviorism, the musical mood remains motivational and clearly geared toward a dynamic dance setting.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
